name: DirExplorer
description: Directory & codebase exploration tools (Grep, Glob, Read) for rapid file discovery, regex search, and content inspection with workspace-aware path resolution.
brief: You can explore any codebase with the `Grep` (regex search), `Glob` (file pattern matching), and `Read` (text file reading) tools. These tools are workspace-aware — relative paths resolve against the current project directory.
author: Evonic
